modules.title: Final Capstone: File Room Handoff
learningObjectives: Create a clean folder structure for a real workspace.
Move and rename files into useful locations.
Copy important notes into a backup folder.
Inspect files before removing temporary clutter.
Leave a final ready marker that confirms the workspace is organized.
guidedExercises: Sort a messy workspace with mkdir, cp, mv, rm, cat, head, tail, wc, pwd, and ls.
Use only safe commands inside the provided workspace.
Check the final file tree against the handoff requirements.
modules.moduleProject: Clean an event workspace, back up key notes, remove temporary clutter, and leave a ready marker.

sections.title: Final Capstone
sections.summary: Clean a small event file room and leave the workspace ready for handoff.

topics.title: Capstone: File Room Handoff
topics.summary: Sort event notes, backups, code samples, and temporary files into a clean handoff workspace.
learningGoals: Use core terminal commands together to organize a realistic workspace.

modules.description: Use the terminal to clean up a small event workspace and leave a clear handoff for the next person.
